name: medium-multifile-behavior-change-ships
description: A fully-compliant multi-file medium change (HTTP client retry backoff) with contract, independent review, executable evidence, and completion record passes every runtime gate. No boundary text, so the risk floor stays low.

record.goal: Add bounded exponential backoff to the HTTP client retry path and update its callers

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Retries use bounded exponential backoff; caller behavior unchanged

verification_plan: unit tests for the backoff schedule

minimality_decision.reason: extend the existing retry helper; no new dependency
